title: Pipeline processing knobs
description: Tunable runtime configuration for fetch and result aggregation. The only file in config/. Lives outside datasets/ because these values are policy, not data — but the schema lives in datasets/schemas/ so a single validator can cover everything (CLAUDE.md §3, §11).

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. Fetch knobs (concurrency, retry, cache TTL, timeout, user agent) and result aggregation knobs (top_n, others collapsing, NOTA placement).
Added required source field per provenance contract (CLAUDE.md §12). For config files this is typically 'hand-authored'.
Replaced single source string with sources array per ADR-0002 (config files always carry empty array = hand-authored). Removed cache_ttl_seconds: no HTTP cache layer per ADR-0003.

sources.description: Provenance per CLAUDE.md §12 / ADR-0002. Config files always carry an empty array (hand-authored).

top_n_candidates.description: Number of candidates retained per constituency before the others bucket. NOTA is always broken out separately and does not count toward this N.

collapse_others.description: If true, candidates beyond top_n are summed into a single 'others' bucket. If false, all candidates are kept (no others bucket emitted).
